slice_history.goal: Initial build — all 4 packs, setup.sh, README, methodology doc
slice_history.notes: Built across multiple claude.ai sessions. Full pack first, then standalone, claude-code, codex.

slice_history.goal: Apply Post-Delivery Feedback Loop edits to all packs
slice_history.notes: Feedback loop (ISSUES REPORTED / APPROVED / STOP) applied to all orchestrator files, slice-plan skills, and standalone commands across all 5 packs.

slice_history.goal: Verify all packs are consistent and commands match across packs
slice_history.notes: Audit confirmed all 5 packs have identical 17 commands and 8 procedure skills. Added F11 (OpenCode), F12 (Design Command) to requirements.json. Updated all counts from 4→5 packs, 16→17 commands.

slice_history.goal: Add bridge-advisor strategic advisor command to all packs
slice_history.notes: Created bridge-advisor in all 5 packs (F13). 3 advisor roles: Product Strategist, Developer Advocate, Critical Friend. Updated command listings in AGENTS.md (codex, opencode) and setup.sh. All counts updated 17→18 commands.

slice_history.goal: Rebuild all 5 tar.gz files using package.sh
slice_history.notes: Rebuilt all tar.gz files: bridge-full (22K), bridge-standalone (22K), bridge-claude-code (23K), bridge-codex (23K), bridge-opencode (23K). All archives validated.

slice_history.goal: Fix RooCode Ask-mode return path so orchestrator resumes active slice automatically
slice_history.notes: Initial attempt added CLARIFICATIONS HANDLED VIA ASK rules (post-hoc). Replaced in S06 with preventive approach: ban Ask mode switching entirely, use HUMAN: blocks for clarifications instead.

slice_history.goal: Replace ineffective Ask-mode return rules with preventive no-Ask-mode constraint
slice_history.notes: Removed CLARIFICATIONS HANDLED VIA ASK sections from bridge-full orchestrator policy and standalone bridge-start/bridge-resume commands. Added hard constraint: NEVER switch to Ask mode — use HUMAN: blocks for user input, delegate to sub-tasks for code investigation. Root cause: S05 fix was post-hoc (told AI to recover after switching) instead of preventive (tell AI not to switch). Tar.gz rebuild needed.

slice_history.goal: Align bridge-codex with latest Codex conventions and fix Codex-pack inconsistencies
slice_history.notes: Researched latest Codex docs/changelog. Added native `.codex/skills/` tree (26 skills) as compatibility target, kept `.agents/skills/` as authoring mirror, standardized command references to `$bridge-*`, aligned status vocabulary to planned/in-progress/review/done/blocked, fixed eval filename expectation and context path typo, and added `quality_gates.e2e_critical_paths` to codex requirements template. Updated codex config with optional `profiles.bridge` (gpt-5-codex + reasoning summary auto); omitted `web_search` from profile defaults for cross-version compatibility (use `--search` at runtime).

slice_history.goal: Fix Codex profile parse incompatibility for web_search in bridge-codex
slice_history.notes: Removed `web_search` from `bridge-codex/.codex/config.toml` profile defaults to avoid version-specific parsing errors. Added guidance to use `codex --profile bridge --search` when needed. Rebuilt distributable archives with `./package.sh` and sanity-checked `codex --profile bridge --help` in `bridge-codex/`.

slice_history.goal: Remove redundant .codex/skills/ from bridge-codex — single skills directory
slice_history.notes: Removed duplicate `.codex/skills/` directory (byte-for-byte copy of `.agents/skills/`). Skills now live only in `.agents/skills/` per standard Codex convention. `.codex/` retains only `config.toml`. Updated AGENTS.md to remove dual-directory reference. Rebuilt all archives.

slice_history.goal: Separate Codex workflow skills from internal procedures to avoid confusing `$` skill suggestions
slice_history.notes: Moved 8 internal procedure docs from `.agents/skills/*/SKILL.md` to `.agents/procedures/*.md` in `bridge-codex`, updated workflow skills to reference procedure file paths directly, and updated `bridge-codex/AGENTS.md` plus requirements F04 to document the new split. Result: only 18 workflow commands remain in Codex skill discovery.

slice_history.goal: Fix Codex skill naming to Title Case + create platform usage guides
slice_history.notes: Standardized all 18 Codex SKILL.md `name:` fields to Title Case (15 fixed, 3 already correct). Created `reference/platform-guides.md` with step-by-step workflows for RooCode (Full + Standalone), Claude Code, and Codex, plus a command reference matrix. Added Platform Guides section to README.md. Rebuilt all 6 archives.

slice_history.goal: Remove obsolete commands (migrate, offload, reintegrate) and skills (external-handoff, external-reintegrate) — update all references
slice_history.notes: 3 commands (migrate, offload, reintegrate) and 2 skills (external-handoff, external-reintegrate) removed from all 5 packs as intentional cleanup. Updated: requirements.json (18→15 commands, 8→6 skills), test.sh arrays, README.md, CLAUDE.md, bridge-codex/AGENTS.md, bridge-claude-code/*/CLAUDE.md, reference/BRIDGE-v2.1-methodology.md, reference/platform-guides.md. Added F14 (Controller Pack) and F15 (Multi-Repo Pack) with AT12/AT13 to requirements.json. All 52 smoke tests pass. Archives rebuilt.

handoff.stopped_at: Session wrap-up (2026-03-09) — S12 done, gate PASSED, eval pack generated (23 scenarios, 115 E2E assertions), install.sh ask_yn bug fixed. All uncommitted — user will commit.
handoff.next_immediate: Commit all changes. Then: manual testing using docs/gates-evals/eval-scenarios.md, fill docs/gates-evals/feedback-template.md, run /bridge-feedback to process results.
watch_out: Do not reintroduce `SKILL.md` files under `.agents/skills/` for internal procedures, or they will appear in Codex `$` discovery
Do not add `profiles.bridge.web_search` back to config defaults unless verified against the current Codex config schema
5 non-blocking gate warnings (W01-W05) remain — see docs/gates-evals/gate-report.md
Archives were rebuilt during this session but install.sh fix happened after — rebuild with ./package.sh if distributing

gate_history.notes: 3 commands (migrate, offload, reintegrate) and 2 skills (external-handoff, external-reintegrate) deleted from all packs but requirements.json still specifies 18 commands and 8 skills. Documentation, tests, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md all contain stale references. New packs (controller, multi-repo) untracked.

All 11 previous blocking issues resolved. 52/52 smoke tests pass. F14 (Controller) and F15 (Multi-Repo) verified against AT12/AT13. No stale references in pack sources. 5 non-blocking warnings: eval in install.sh, methodology doc missing 2 commands, AT10 archive count outdated, AT06 no integration test, shellcheck not installed.

commands_to_run.verify_commands: for pack in bridge-full bridge-standalone bridge-claude-code bridge-codex bridge-opencode; do echo "=== $pack ==="; find $pack -name '*.md' | grep -c command; done
commands_to_run.verify_feedback_loop: grep -rl 'ISSUES REPORTED' bridge-full/ bridge-standalone/ bridge-claude-code/ bridge-codex/ bridge-opencode/ | sort

eval_history.notes: 23 manual scenarios covering all 6 user flows (UF01-UF06), all 15 features, and all 13 acceptance tests. 4 E2E test scripts: test-setup-packs.sh (32 assertions), test-pack-consistency.sh (25 assertions), test-advanced-packs.sh (37 assertions), test-workflow-content.sh (21 assertions). All 115 E2E assertions pass.

discrepancies.description: requirements.json F07 specifies 18 commands (including migrate, offload, reintegrate) but codebase has only 15 commands — those 3 were deleted
discrepancies.resolution: resolved in S12 — requirements updated to 15 commands (intentional deletion confirmed by user)

discrepancies.description: requirements.json scope specifies 8 procedure skills per pack but codebase has only 6 — bridge-external-handoff and bridge-external-reintegrate were deleted
discrepancies.resolution: resolved in S12 — requirements updated to 6 skills

discrepancies.description: bridge-codex/AGENTS.md lines 123-124 and bridge-claude-code/*/CLAUDE.md lines 83-84 reference deleted skill/procedure files
discrepancies.resolution: resolved in S12 — stale references removed from all files

discrepancies.description: New packs bridge-controller/ and bridge-multi-repo/ exist in codebase, built by package.sh, installed by install.sh, but have no feature IDs or acceptance tests in requirements.json
discrepancies.resolution: resolved in S12 — added as F14 (Controller Pack) and F15 (Multi-Repo Pack) with AT12/AT13
